title: Riot Platforms Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results and Strategic Highlights
text: Riot reported record quarterly revenue of $180.2 million with net income of $104.5 million, or $0.26 diluted EPS. This represented an 18% increase from the previous quarter's $153 million. Bitcoin Mining revenue was $160.8 million for the quarter, compared to $67.5 million for the same three-month period in 2024. Riot produced 1,406 bitcoin in Q3, compared to 1,104 during the same three-month period in 2024. The strong quarterly results demonstrate the company's ability to scale operations and generate substantial profits despite volatile Bitcoin prices. Data center operations continue to expand with AMD partnership ramping up. The company's strategic positioning in AI infrastructure is gaining traction with meaningful revenue contributions from the Corsicana facility data center operations.
